typecheck.detail: Success: no issues found in 17 source files

lint.command: cd quant-dashboard && python3 -m ruff check src/

appliedUpdates.description: Added .factory/library/index-symbol-naming.md documenting that MarketReader uses exchange-suffixed symbols (000300.SH) while IndexFetcher uses bare codes (000300), and when to use each.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add coding convention: 'Always quote pip version specifiers in shell commands, e.g., pip install "backtesting>=0.3.3"' to prevent shell glob expansion creating stray files.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature data-adapter-and-commission worker ran unquoted pip install causing a stray '=0.3.3' file that needed manual cleanup.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add testing guidance: 'Tests should verify actual behavior, not just assert type membership or trivially-true conditions. For strategy wrappers, test that signals produce expected trade actions by examining backtest results.' Consider adding minimum test quality bar alongside the existing minimum test count requirements.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature chan-theory-bt-strategy-wrapper had 16 tests, but 3-4 were tautological (e.g., asserting SignalType.BUY_1 is in a tuple containing SignalType.BUY_1, asserting num_trades >= 0). While not blocking, these tests provide false confidence.

rejectedObservations.observation: AGENTS.md should note that adapters may instantiate strategy classes at runtime
rejectedObservations.reason: This is obvious from the architecture (adapters wrap strategies for backtesting.py) and doesn't need explicit documentation. The off-limits rule is about not modifying source in src/strategy/, not about importing from it.

rejectedObservations.observation: architecture.md project structure doesn't show src/adapters/ or src/reporting/
rejectedObservations.reason: architecture.md in .factory/library/ is a reference doc that will be updated as part of normal documentation maintenance. Not a shared state issue requiring immediate action — the architecture diagram is descriptive, not prescriptive.

rejectedObservations.observation: Backend-worker skill procedure works well for adapter implementation work
rejectedObservations.reason: Positive observation, no action needed. This confirms the skill is well-suited for its purpose.
